feature: Ventas POS Credit Payments (CxC Abonos) - P0 Bug Fix
summary: Complete testing of P0 bug fix: Credit sales now correctly display 'Pago Asociado' amounts (pagos_cxc) and provide payment history visibility via new /pagos-credito endpoint. All backend and frontend tests passed.

Backend_pagos_cxc_subquery.description: GET /api/ventas-pos?estado=credito returns pagos_cxc and num_pagos_cxc fields
Backend_pagos_cxc_subquery.details: Order 146699 correctly shows pagos_cxc=50.0 and num_pagos_cxc=1

Backend_pagos_credito_endpoint.details: Returns cxc info (monto_original=78, saldo_pendiente=28, estado=parcial) and 1 abono of S/50 with forma_pago=transferencia, cuenta=BCP

Backend_pagos_credito_nonexistent.description: GET /api/ventas-pos/999999/pagos-credito returns empty for non-existent order

Frontend_credito_tab_pagos_display.description: Credito tab shows S/ 50.00 in Pagos Asoc column (not 0.00)
Frontend_credito_tab_pagos_display.details: Credit sale row displays S/ 50.00 in green text - bug fixed

Frontend_ver_pagos_button.description: Eye icon button opens Pagos de Credito modal

Frontend_modal_cxc_info.description: Modal shows correct CxC info cards
Frontend_modal_cxc_info.details: Displays Monto Original S/ 78.00, Total Cobrado S/ 50.00, Saldo Pendiente S/ 28.00, Estado Parcial, Vence 12/4/2026

Frontend_modal_payment_row.description: Modal shows payment details in table
Frontend_modal_payment_row.details: Shows 1 payment row with fecha=13/3/2026, forma_pago=transferencia, cuenta=BCP, monto=S/ 50.00

Frontend_modal_close.description: Modal Cerrar button closes the modal
Frontend_modal_close.details: Clicking Cerrar button successfully closes the modal

tests_executed.name: Frontend: Verify S/ 50.00 in Pagos Asoc column
Frontend: Click eye icon to open modal
Frontend: Close modal with Cerrar button

test_credentials: empresa_id=7 (X-Empresa-Id header), order_id=146699 for credit sale with partial payment
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing order 146699 with CxC abono
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: Credit sales in Ventas POS > Credito tab now correctly show CxC abono totals (pagos_cxc field) in the Pagos Asoc column. The eye button opens a modal with full payment history from cont_cxc_abono table. Test order 146699 has 1 partial payment of S/50 against S/78 total.
